message:
Running command: 
# The `ls "$RUN_DIR/final/"` returned 0 but path doesn't exist - it was a false positive
# from the `ls ... && echo "=== FINAL ==="` in the loop.
# Actually the `ls` returned some content but empty.

# Let me check more carefully
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== Checking final dir existence ==="
[ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "final EXISTS" || echo "final DOES NOT EXIST"

echo ""
echo "=== Step 71 ==="
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/71-openroad-detailedrouting/" 2>/dev/null
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/71-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== All processes ==="
ps aux | grep -E "(openroad|librelane)" | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2,"CMD:"$11,"CPU:"$3"%","TIME:"$10}'

echo ""
echo "=== Latest pipe drain content ==="
wc -c /tmp/drt2_pipe.log
tail -30 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log

echo ""
echo "=== flow.log tail ==="
tail -15 "$RUN_DIR/flow.log"
